user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate PWM functionality to new AURIX target
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Configure eGTM ATOM0 in Cluster 0 for 3 center-aligned complementary PWM pairs at 20 kHz with 1 µs rising/falling dead-time, initial duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75%, with 10% duty step per update; enable syncStart and syncUpdate; use FXCLK0 for ATOM and DTM clock 0; route outputs to specified TOUT pins; period ISR (prio 20, TOS CPU0, vmId IfxSrc_VmId_0) toggles LED P03.9.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use unified high-level IfxEgtm_Pwm to configure EGTM0 ATOM0 (cluster 0) base+sync channels with DTM-managed complementary outputs, center-aligned at 20 kHz, FXCLK0 clocking, and 1 µs dead-time. Set active-high HS and active-low LS, push-pull, and enable syncStart/syncUpdate in the config. Use IfxEgtm_Cmu to enable FXCLK0 and IfxPort for LED GPIO. Update duties synchronously via IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDuty and toggle LED in the period ISR provided through the driver’s interrupt config.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level PWM driver supports EGTM ATOM complementary PWM with center alignment, dead-time via DTM, synchronous start/update, and grouped multi-channel control, matching the migration goal from GTM TOM to eGTM ATOM on TC4xx.

runtime_function.name: updateEgtmAtom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Apply 10% duty step updates synchronously across the three complementary pairs and toggle LED P03.9 on period ISR.

api_changes.reason: TC3xx→TC4xx function rename and peripheral change (GTM TOM → eGTM ATOM)
Honor syncUpdate requirement: use synchronous update instead of immediate

migration_notes.context_preserved: The new configuration uses EGTM0 ATOM0 cluster 0 with unified IfxEgtm_Pwm to generate 3 center-aligned complementary PWM pairs at 20 kHz with 1 µs dead-time, sets HS/LS polarities, enables syncStart/syncUpdate, selects FXCLK0 for ATOM/DTM clocking, and provides a period ISR to toggle LED P03.9. Pin routing to requested TOUTs is planned via IfxEgtm_PinMap-configured entries inside the unified driver’s config. Note: Exact ATOM0 channel indices and TOUT mapping for TC4D7 must be verified in IfxEgtm_PinMap.h to finalize channelConfig.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
